questionHtml: There are viruses in soils that are pathogens of animals. Outline a reason for antibiotics in soil not eliminating these viruses.
markschemeHtml:
1. viruses lack metabolism/plasma membranes/cell walls / viruses are not livingorganisms;
  2. antibiotics kill/target bacteria/prokaryotes but not viruses;
  3. viral pathogens of animals use animal metabolism (which is not affected by antibiotics);

meta.title: There are viruses in soils that are pathogens of animals. Outline a reason for antibiotics in soil not eliminating these viruses.
breadcrumbLabels: C3.2.14. Evolution of resistance to several antibiotics in strains of pathogenic bacteria
